title: (Urgent) Technicianx20 | Up$3.2k
description:
The Opportunity:

  • Our Client, a Global leading MNC in Semiconductor manufacturing industry
  • Location: Upper Changi/ Tampines
  • Salary: Up to $3,200 basic + Allowance
  • Working hours: Monday – Friday, 7am – 4.30pm/4pm – 1.30am
  • Company Transport provided (Selected Areas)
  • Training provided!


Job Responsibilities:

  • Perform various electro-mechanical assembly tasks under general supervision.
  • Read and interpret complex electro-mechanical diagrams and schematic drawings.
  • Follow detailed manufacturing procedures.
  • Validate the design, fabrication, and fit of assemblies.
  • Edit and provide feedback on technical reports and manufacturing procedures.
  • Perform precision measurements and work within close tolerances.
  • Complete additional duties or training as required by the supervisor.
  • Other duties as assigned.


Job Requirements:

  • Minimally Nitec in Engineering or related qualifications
  • Experience in Assembly, Build, Test, and preventive Maintenance
  • Excellent attention to detail and ability to follow SOPs accurately
  • Able to work in cleanroom environment

Next Step:

  • Shortlisted candidates will be contacted


Jason Ng

Direct Line: 6697 7967

EA License No: 91C2918

Personnel Registration Number: R23113333

postedCompany.description:
The Adecco Group is the world's leading provider of HR solutions. With over 35,000 FTE employees and over 5,200 branches, in over 60 countries and territories around the world, we offer a wide variety of services, connecting more than 650,000 associates with over 100,000 clients every day.

The services we offer fall into the broad categories of temporary staffing, permanent placement, career transition and talent development, as well as outsourcing and consulting. The Adecco Group is based in Zurich-Glattbrugg, Switzerland and we are a Fortune Global 500 company listed on the SIX Swiss Exchange.
postedCompany.name: ADECCO PERSONNEL PTE LTD
